reviews.comment:
Hermosa estación de servicio ,muy buena atención en los surtidores ,también en el autoservicio ,buen lugar para hacer parada .recomiendo

(Translated by Google)
Beautiful gas station, very good service at the pumps and also at the drive-thru, a good place to stop. I recommend it.

reviews.comment:
Muy lindo lugar para cargar combustible y y agua caliente y estirar las piernas antes de seguir el viaje a la costa

(Translated by Google)
A very nice place to refuel, get hot water, and stretch your legs before continuing your journey to the coast.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5216193713226017652/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNSdF9ETzR3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Buena atención de los chicos!. Muy amables. No para mucha gente y eso que pasamos un fin de semana largo. Recomendado para no estancarse en otras más grandes

(Translated by Google)
Great service from the staff! Very friendly. Not too crowded, even though we were there for a long weekend. Recommended if you don't want to get stuck in larger hotels.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5216193713226017652/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNScDg3ZTN3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Paré a cargar nafta, estirar las piernas y tomarme un cafecito en la ruta. Me atendieron super bien.

(Translated by Google)
I stopped to fill up with gas, stretch my legs, and have a coffee on the road. The service was excellent.
